naCriteria.runtime-overlay: Package only owns a tsx worker shim and relies on validated shared packages for compile-time guarantees.
naCriteria.shared-source-only: Package exposes shared source-only modules consumed directly from repository code.
naCriteria.template-only: Package contains runtime-loaded templates and does not publish a standalone distributable artifact.
naCriteria.types-only: Package exports only types or schemas and is validated transitively by consumer typechecks.

build.justification: Email templates are rendered in-place by consumers and do not ship a separate library build.
Shared error helpers are consumed directly from source and do not require an isolated bundle.

test.justification: Behavior is covered transitively by importing packages and no standalone runtime entrypoint exists.
Schemas and type contracts are validated by downstream typecheck suites and package consumers.

build.justification: The package runs a tsx worker shim and does not ship a standalone distributable bundle.

typecheck.justification: Worker imports resolve through shared package lanes; wrapper correctness is guarded by lint plus downstream package typechecks.
